title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 4: Selection of tests for interactions with blood (ISO 10993-4:2017)
title.zh: 医疗器械生物学评价 - 第4部分：与血液相互作用的试验选择

standards.scope: Selection of tests for interactions with blood
standards.abstract: Describes general requirements for evaluating the interactions of medical devices with blood, including categories of blood-contacting devices.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 9: Framework for identification and quantification of potential degradation products (ISO 10993-9:2019)
title.zh: 医疗器械生物学评价 - 第9部分：潜在降解产物的鉴定和定量框架

standards.abstract: Provides a framework for the identification and quantification of potential degradation products from medical devices.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 10: Tests for skin sensitisation (ISO 10993-10:2021)
title.zh: 医疗器械生物学评价 - 第10部分：皮肤致敏试验

standards.abstract: Describes procedures for assessing whether medical devices or their constituent materials cause skin sensitization (delayed-type hypersensitivity).

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 12: Sample preparation and reference materials (ISO 10993-12:2021)
title.zh: 医疗器械生物学评价 - 第12部分：样品制备和参考材料

standards.scope: Sample preparation and reference materials for biological evaluation
standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and guidance for the procedures to be followed in the preparation of samples and the selection of reference materials for biological testing.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 15: Identification and quantification of degradation products from metals and alloys (ISO 10993-15:2019)
title.zh: 医疗器械生物学评价 - 第15部分：金属和合金降解产物的鉴定和定量

standards.scope: Identification and quantification of degradation products from metals and alloys
standards.abstract: Provides requirements for the design of tests to identify and quantify degradation products from metals and alloys used in medical devices.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 17: Toxicological risk assessment of medical device constituents (ISO 10993-17:2023)
title.zh: 医疗器械生物学评价 - 第17部分：医疗器械成分的毒理学风险评估

standards.abstract: Establishes allowable limits for leachable substances from medical devices. Specifies a systematic approach to the toxicological risk assessment of chemicals.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 18: Chemical characterization of medical device materials within a risk management process (ISO 10993-18:2020)
title.zh: 医疗器械生物学评价 - 第18部分：风险管理过程中医疗器械材料的化学表征

standards.abstract: Specifies a framework for the identification and, if necessary, quantification of constituents of a medical device, allowing estimation of biological exposure.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 23: Tests for irritation (ISO 10993-23:2021)
title.zh: 医疗器械生物学评价 - 第23部分：刺激性试验

standards.abstract: Specifies tests for irritation of skin and mucous membranes by medical devices and their materials or extracts. Amendment A1:2025 adds additional in vitro reconstructed human epidermis models.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 1: Requirements and general principles for the evaluation of biological safety within a risk management process (ISO 10993-1:2025)
title.zh: 医疗器械生物学评价 - 第1部分：风险管理过程中生物安全评价的要求和一般原则

scope.en: General framework for biological evaluation of medical devices within risk management

standards.abstract: Specifies the general principles governing the biological evaluation of medical devices within a risk management process, including categorisation of devices based on nature and duration of body contact.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 5: Tests for in vitro cytotoxicity (ISO 10993-5:2009)
title.zh: 医疗器械生物学评价 - 第5部分：体外细胞毒性试验

scope.en: In vitro cytotoxicity testing of medical devices

standards.abstract: Describes test methods for the assessment of in vitro cytotoxicity of medical devices. Amendment A11:2025 adds EU MDR-specific Annex Z requirements.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 3: Tests for genotoxicity, carcinogenicity and reproductive toxicity (ISO 10993-3:2014)
title.zh: 医疗器械生物学评价 - 第3部分：遗传毒性、致癌性和生殖毒性试验

scope.en: Genotoxicity, carcinogenicity and reproductive toxicity testing

standards.abstract: Specifies categories of tests for genotoxicity, carcinogenicity and reproductive toxicity for evaluating potential genetic and reproductive hazards arising from medical devices.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 7: Ethylene oxide sterilization residuals (ISO 10993-7:2008)
title.zh: 医疗器械生物学评价 - 第7部分：环氧乙烷灭菌残留物

scope.en: Allowable limits for ethylene oxide sterilization residuals

standards.abstract: Specifies allowable limits for residual ethylene oxide (EO) and ethylene chlorohydrin (ECH) in individual EO-sterilised medical devices.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 11: Tests for systemic toxicity (ISO 10993-11:2017)
title.zh: 医疗器械生物学评价 - 第11部分：全身毒性试验

scope.en: Systemic toxicity testing of medical devices

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and gives guidance on procedures for assessing the potential of medical devices and their constituent materials to cause adverse systemic reactions.

title.en: Medical devices utilizing animal tissues and their derivatives - Part 1: Application of risk management (ISO 22442-1:2020)
title.zh: 利用动物组织及其衍生物的医疗器械 - 第1部分：风险管理的应用

scope.en: Risk management for medical devices utilizing animal tissues and their derivatives

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for the application of risk management to medical devices manufactured utilizing animal tissues or their derivatives which are non-viable or rendered non-viable.

title.en: Medical devices utilizing animal tissues and their derivatives - Part 2: Controls on sourcing, collection and handling (ISO 22442-2:2020)
title.zh: 利用动物组织及其衍生物的医疗器械 - 第2部分：来源、采集和处理的控制

scope.en: Controls on sourcing, collection and handling of animal tissues for medical devices

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for controls on the sourcing, collection, and handling of animals and tissues for the manufacture of medical devices.

title.en: Medical devices utilizing animal tissues and their derivatives - Part 3: Validation of the elimination and/or inactivation of viruses and TSE agents (ISO 22442-3:2007, Amd 1:2015)
title.zh: 利用动物组织及其衍生物的医疗器械 - 第3部分：病毒和TSE因子灭活/消除验证

scope.en: Validation of virus and TSE agent elimination/inactivation for animal tissue medical devices

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for the validation of the elimination and/or inactivation of viruses and transmissible spongiform encephalopathy (TSE) agents during the manufacture of medical devices.
